meaning: n.[植](产于南部非洲的)鹤望兰
examples: Strelitzia, Champagne Rose, Dancing Orchids & greenery.
This is a Strelitzia, very beautiful flower. In Teneriffa, we could see this flower at many places.
Different preservative formulas, preconditioning liquids and refrigerating time influenced on vase life and quality of cut Strelitzia reginae flowers were studied.
